items.title: The four action icons are always visible on each project header
items.precondition: DevEasy running; Sessions panel open; at least one project visible in the left rail.
steps: 1. Look at any project header in the rail.
items.expected: folder (Files), branch (Repo), terminal (Terminal), and + (new session) icons are visible at all times to the right of the project name.

items.title: Repo button opens the takeover on the Repo tab
items.precondition: A project visible in the rail.
items.expected: The editor takeover opens with the REPO tab already active (not Files).

items.title: Terminal button opens the takeover on the Terminal tab
items.precondition: A project visible in the rail.
steps: 1. Return to Sessions (back button) if in the editor.
items.expected: The editor takeover opens with the TERMINAL tab already active.

items.title: Folder opens Files; + still starts a session; collapse unchanged
items.precondition: A project visible in the rail.
steps: 1. Hover the header and click the folder icon.
2. Go back, hover, click the + icon.
items.expected: Folder opens the takeover on FILES. + starts a new session. Clicking the chevron/name still collapses/expands the project (does not open the editor). None of the action buttons toggle collapse.

items.title: A long project name truncates; icons stay in place (Rev 2)
items.precondition: A project visible in the rail.
steps: 1. Find or create a project with a long name.
items.expected: The long name shows an ellipsis (truncates); the four icons remain fully visible and are not pushed off the row.
